_meta.description: Runs once per day per student, looping per unit: Greeting → Video → Submission → Quiz (3 questions) → Submission Review → Score → Continue or End. Dynamic steps pull content from the active course's courses/{course}.json via content_ref.
nextjs_notes: Resolve part_of_day (Morning / Afternoon / Evening / Night) from system time before rendering DA-01.

Resolve {{unit_name}} and {{course_display}} from the student's current course + unit_index before rendering DA-02. voice_text for DA-02 is pre-written generically to avoid reading raw unit-name strings awkwardly — swap in a TTS-friendly version per unit if needed later.
type:dynamic steps must fetch their content_ref object from courses/{selected_course}.json at units[current_unit_index] before rendering. Use the path field to locate the exact node.
render_key naming uses {course} and {unit} placeholders, resolve them to the actual course id and unit_index, e.g. quiz-science-1-q1.
[video-{course}-{unit}] renders the VideoPlayer component using the unit's video object.
[submission-{course}-{unit}] renders the SubmissionCard component using the unit's submission object.
[quiz-{course}-{unit}] is a render hint marking where the quiz sub-flow begins inline, the actual rendering is driven by the DA-QUIZ-* steps below.
[Xpts] or [+Xpts] renders the animated point-badge component and increments the points balance in state.
Each quiz question step (DA-QUIZ-N) renders QuizQuestion using content_ref. on_correct.next_step and on_wrong.next_step branch based on the student's tapped option vs correct_option.
DA-QUIZ-N-WRONG steps render QuizFeedback (consolation + hint, then explanation after retry or skip) and offer Try Again or Next as buttons — never free text.

audio_location_cheer_up on a wrong-answer step is a short pep-talk audio clip distinct from the consolation voice_text, play it right after consolation voice_text finishes, before the hint is revealed.
After DA-QUIZ-3 resolves, always continue to DA-11 (submission review) regardless of last question's correctness.
DA-11 triggers an async backend review job, show a lightweight 'reviewing...' indicator until DA-12 is ready to render.
DA-12's display_text and voice_text are intentionally hardcoded per spec, not derived from actual review content, future versions may template this from a real review-result object.
DA-14 (ScoreSummary) pulls quiz_scores, submission_pts, video_pts, and total_today from session state, not from courses.json.
On 'continue', increment current_unit_index, fetch the next unit via DA-NEXT-UNIT, then loop back to DA-01.
On 'later', end at DA-END. Next session resumes at DA-01 with the same unit_index (no auto-increment on exit).
Persist video_done, submission_done, and quiz_scores[] in session cache for the duration of the day's loop, then clear on loop completion.
quiz_fallback_guide fires only on free text at a quiz button step, it never advances the flow.

steps.display_text: Good {{part_of_day}} {{name}} ☀️
steps.voice_text: Good day to you! Hope you're feeling good and ready to learn.
steps.note: part_of_day resolves to Morning / Afternoon / Evening / Night for display_text only.

steps.display_text: Today we'll be learning {{unit_name}} from your {{course_display}} course. Exciting stuff ahead 🔥
steps.voice_text: Today we've got a brand new topic lined up for you, and trust me, it's a good one. Let's dive in!
steps.note: unit_name and course_display resolve from student progress and courses.json for display_text only.

steps.display_text: Let's start with a video. In this video you'll learn: "{{video_description}}" 🎬
steps.voice_text: Let's kick things off with a short video — it's going to make this whole topic click for you.
steps.note: video_description pulled from content_ref video.description for display_text only.

steps.display_text: [video-{course}-{unit}]
steps.note: Render VideoPlayer. On video completion event, auto-advance to DA-05. If the student tries to skip, show skip_warning first and block advance until completion.

skip_warning.display_text: Hey, watch the full video to earn your points and unlock the next part! You've got this 💪
skip_warning.voice_text: Hang on, don't skip just yet — finish the video so you can earn your points and unlock the next part. You've got this!

steps.fallback_guide: Watch the video above to continue — it's worth it, I promise! 🎬

steps.display_text: Yayyy you crushed that video! [10pts] Keep going — every point counts 🌟
steps.voice_text: Yes! You crushed that video, that's ten points right there. Keep that momentum going, every point counts.

steps.display_text: Now it's time to earn some more points 💰 Send in your submission below!
steps.voice_text: Alright, time to earn even more points — go ahead and send in your submission below.

steps.display_text: [submission-{course}-{unit}]
steps.note: Render SubmissionCard. Student picks one emoji reaction and may optionally view reference examples. On submission, store the result and wait delay_after_submit_ms before advancing.
steps.fallback_guide: Do the submission above champ — I'm waiting on you! Just pick your emoji and tap send 😄

steps.display_text: [+25pts] I am SO proud of you {{name}} 🥹 That's the spirit!
steps.voice_text: I am so, so proud of you right now — that's twenty five points, well earned. That's exactly the spirit!

steps.display_text: Now let's test what you've learnt 🧠 Quiz time — let's go!
steps.voice_text: Now let's see what stuck — quiz time, let's go!

steps.display_text: We've got 3 questions coming your way. Take your time — think, then tap! 💡
steps.voice_text: Three questions coming your way. No rush at all — just think it through, then tap your answer.

steps.display_text: [quiz-{course}-{unit}-q1]
steps.fallback_guide: Tap one of the answer options above — just trust your gut! 💭

steps.display_text: That's right! 🎯 You really paid attention. On to the next one!
steps.voice_text: That's right, nicely done! You were clearly paying attention. Let's move on to the next one.

steps.note: Render consolation text first, play audio_location then audio_location_cheer_up, then reveal hint from content_ref. If retried and wrong again or skipped, explanation may be shown via QuizFeedback.
steps.fallback_guide: Tap 'Try again' to reattempt or 'Next question' to move on!

steps.display_text: Keep it up {{name}} — halfway there! You're doing great 💪
steps.voice_text: Keep it up, you're already halfway there. You're doing great!

steps.display_text: [quiz-{course}-{unit}-q2]
steps.fallback_guide: Tap one of the answer options above! You've got this 💭

steps.display_text: Nailed it again! 🔥 One more question to go — you're on fire!
steps.voice_text: Nailed it again! Just one more question to go, you are on fire right now.

steps.note: Render consolation text first, play audio_location then audio_location_cheer_up, then reveal hint from content_ref. If retried and wrong again or skipped, explanation may be shown via QuizFeedback.
steps.fallback_guide: Tap 'Try again' or 'Next question' to continue!

steps.display_text: Last one {{name}}! Give it everything you've got 🚀
steps.voice_text: This is the last one — give it everything you've got!

steps.display_text: [quiz-{course}-{unit}-q3]
steps.fallback_guide: You're almost there — just tap your answer above! 💭

steps.display_text: Three for three?! You absolute legend 🏆 Quiz done!
steps.voice_text: Three for three! You are an absolute legend. That's the quiz wrapped up.

steps.note: Render consolation text first, play audio_location then audio_location_cheer_up, then reveal hint from content_ref. If retried and wrong again or skipped, explanation may be shown via QuizFeedback.
steps.fallback_guide: Tap 'Try again' or 'See results' to move on!

steps.display_text: Quiz done! While your submission gets reviewed, sit tight — I'll be back with feedback soon 🕐
steps.voice_text: Quiz's all done. While your submission is being looked over, just sit tight — I'll be right back with some feedback.
steps.note: Triggers an async backend review job. Show a lightweight 'review in progress' indicator until DA-12 is ready.

steps.display_text: I reviewed your work champ and here's what I think: you showed real effort and creativity today — that's what learning looks like 🌱 Keep building on this every day.
steps.voice_text: Alright champ, I went through your work, and here's what I think — you showed real effort and creativity today, and honestly, that's exactly what learning looks like. Keep building on this, one day at a time.
steps.note: Hardcoded per spec. Future versions may template this from an actual review-result object.

steps.display_text: You did so well today {{name}} 🥳 Want to know your score?
steps.voice_text: You did so well today. Want to know your score?
steps.fallback_guide: Tap 'Yes yes yes!' to see your score! 🙌

steps.display_text: [champ-score]
steps.voice_text: Here's how today added up for you.
steps.note: Render ScoreSummary component. Scores pulled from session state, not from courses.json.

steps.display_text: Good job champ 🤜🤛 Ready for more or shall we pick up tomorrow?
steps.voice_text: Good job today. Are you up for a bit more, or should we pick this up tomorrow?

options.label: Let's go! 🚀
options.note: Advances to the next unit. Increment current_unit_index on selection.

steps.fallback_guide: Tap 'Let's go!' to keep learning or 'Maybe later' to rest — either way you did amazing today!

steps.display_text: [{course}-unit-{next_unit_index}]
steps.voice_text: Here's a sneak peek at what's coming up next.
steps.note: Shows the title of the next unit, then loops back to DA-01 with updated unit context.

steps.display_text: I'll see you tomorrow {{name}} — rest well, you've earned it 💤 Same time tomorrow?
steps.voice_text: Alright then, I'll see you tomorrow. Rest well, you've definitely earned it. Same time tomorrow?
steps.note: End of daily loop. Flow resumes next session at DA-01 with the same unit_index.
